app.name: Proof
app.one_sentence_promise: Log what a batch actually costs you in materials and time, and know the price that keeps you from secretly losing money.
app.target_user: Side-hustle makers and small-batch sellers who price intuitively and have never calculated true per-unit cost including their own labor time.
app.painful_moment: Finishing a batch of product and having no real answer to 'am I actually making money on this.'
app.why_different: Calculates true landed cost per unit including labor at a user-set rate, and derives a defensible minimum price.
app.why_users_pay: Unlimited products, a reusable material cost library, and profit-trend reporting versus a single-product free tier.
app.subscription_model: Free: 1 tracked product. Paid (~$5.99/mo or $44/yr): unlimited products, shared material cost library, batch profit-trend history.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Local product/recipe records, reusable material cost entries, labor time entry with user-set hourly rate, per-batch true-cost calculation, suggested pricing, local profit-history tracking.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Repository protocol boundary now; later, optional cloud backup/sync and a marketplace sales-import point behind the same interface.
core_workflows: define a product/recipe with materials and quantities
get a suggested minimum price for a target margin
ios_native_features: Share sheet export of a priced product card
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: None — deliberately no bonus tech; the value is disciplined cost accounting done well.
app.design_direction: Warm, craft-market aesthetic with honest, ledger-like data presentation.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a premium iOS small-batch-business costing app called Proof. Warm craft-market aesthetic, ledger-like clarity, product/recipe list, materials-and-labor entry screen, suggested-pricing result with profit-trend chart. Include empty state and a state where labor rate hasn't been set yet.
app.app_store_positioning: The true cost of what you make, finally in plain numbers.
key_risks: Users may resist entering honest labor time, undermining the core calculation
Material entry could feel tedious for makers with many small inputs
app.invalidation_criteria: If users stop logging labor time within the first few batches, the promise collapses to materials-only and needs repositioning.
app.v1_build_scope: Single-user local product/recipe and cost tracking, labor-time entry, true-cost calculation with suggested pricing, profit-trend history, full state coverage, StoreKit 2 paywall.
